## ⚙️ How It Works

1. Tracks 300+ finance/fintech/crypto/quant GitHub repos
2. Every Sunday, fetches current star counts and calculates weekly growth
3. Ranks by `Δ stars` (new stars gained in 7 days)
4. Publishes the Top 10 here + on the [GitHub Pages site](https://davidlifschitz.github.io/fastest-growing-finance-repos/)
5. Monthly discovery scan adds newly trending repos automatically

## 🏷️ Topics Tracked

`finance` · `fintech` · `quant` · `algorithmic-trading` · `cryptocurrency` · `trading-bot` · `quantitative-finance` · `defi` · `blockchain-finance` · `stock-market` · `options-trading` · `portfolio-management` · `backtesting` · `high-frequency-trading` · `crypto-trading`
